description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure standing upright on a rectangular stone pedestal. The figure appears to be wearing traditional, flowing garments with detailed folds and sleeves, and has one hand raised to the chest in a gesture of contemplation or greeting. The face is serene and slightly downcast, with a hood or head covering that drapes over the shoulders. The pedestal is made of rough-hewn stone, with visible chisel marks and an inscription or characters on the front face. The overall surface of the sculpture is matte and textured, suggesting it is made from cast metal or stone. The object exudes a sense of solemnity and reverence, suitable for public display in a park or urban square.
description: A solemn, robed human figure stands on a rough stone pedestal, with one hand raised to the chest and detailed garment folds. The sculpture has a matte, textured surface and an inscription on the pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, hand gesture, and inscription on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped sleeve and the layered garment details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe and the full width of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the textured surface of the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a stone pedestal, suggesting an outdoor or public urban setting.
